case_title: KWAN, PATRICK vs. BEAUMONT, WILLIAM T. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAUMONT, WILLIAM T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1949 48TH AVE [DOWNSTAIRS FLAT], LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.- CCP 415.46.

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUMONT, WILLIAM T.
